- `sky_color` - sky/background color calculation
- `write_image` - writes PPM image
- `allocate_image` - allocates image buffer
- `ray_create` - creates a ray
- `ray_at` - position along a ray
- `vector_normalize` - normalizes a vector
- `sphere_intersect` - ray-sphere intersection
- `plane_intersect` - ray-plane intersection
- `free_image` - frees image memory
- `is_in_shadow` - shadow testing
